THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT DAUCHOT M.D., MICHAEL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MANNIX, KEVIN MANNIX, ANNE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,635.00, THE COURT FOUND THAT APPELLANT MANNIX FAILED TO MAKE REASONABLE EFFORTS TO MITIGATE DAMAGES BY MARKETING THE UNIT FOR THE REMAINING LEASE PERIOD AT A HIGHER RENTAL THAN THE LEASE RENTAL RATE.
